overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring the sun-drenched medieval city of Toussaint. The character descends a grand staircase, navigates through vibrant plazas and cobblestone streets, passes under a triumphal arch, walks through a covered terrace overlooking the sea, and explores a courtyard with a central fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with ornate balustrades

agents.ego_description: walking down a grand stone staircase, following an NPC with a distinctive purple hat

notable_agents.action: NPC wearing a purple hat and blue tunic descending the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with worn steps leading down to the town square
ornate carved stone railing with decorative pillars lining the left side of the stairs
vibrant Mediterranean-style buildings with red and blue facades visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt descending a grand stone staircase in the historic city of Toussaint. Ornate stone balustrades flank both sides of the stairs, while colorful Renaissance-style townhouses are visible in the distance. An NPC with a purple hat walks ahead, and the camera follows smoothly downward toward the plaza below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with central tree

events.description: exits the staircase into a sunlit town square dominated by a large central tree

agents.ego_description: navigating around the central plaza, circling past a large tree and colorful Renaissance buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in a red dress walking across the cobblestone plaza

entered.detail: massive mature tree with dense green canopy casting shadows over the plaza
three-story building with bright blue facade and red window shutters
rectangular stone planter with greenery surrounding the tree base

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into a wide-open town square, the scene is dominated by a massive central tree casting dappled shadows on the cobblestones. Geralt walks around the tree, passing colorful townhouses with blue and red facades. A woman in a red dress crosses the plaza in the distance as the camera turns left toward the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street leading to triumphal arch

events.description: passes through the large triumphal archway into the next district

agents.ego_description: walking up the cobblestone street toward an imposing triumphal arch, passing historic stone buildings

notable_agents.action: woman in a green dress sitting on steps near the archway entrance

entered.detail: large ornate stone archway with red accents and decorative carvings spanning the street
elegant stone building with cream-colored facade and multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a cobblestone street flanked by historic stone buildings, approaching an impressive triumphal arch that spans the roadway. The architecture features cream and red facades with ornate detailing. A woman in green sits near the arch entrance as Geralt passes underneath the massive stone structure into the next area.

events.description: enters a covered stone terrace with arches overlooking the distant sea and mountains

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered stone terrace lined with arches, passing potted trees with red flowers

notable_agents.action: woman in a blue dress standing by the stone railing looking out at the sea view

entered.detail: covered walkway with stone columns and a wooden ceiling providing partial shade
series of rounded stone archways framing the view of the sea
distant view of blue ocean and mountains visible through the terrace arches
large potted tree with vibrant red blossoms placed along the terrace railing

segments.scene_description: Passing through the arch, the scene transitions to a covered stone terrace with a series of elegant arches overlooking a breathtaking view of the distant sea and mountains. Potted trees with vibrant red flowers line the walkway. A woman in a blue dress stands by the railing admiring the view as Geralt walks through the sheltered colonnade.

events.description: exits the covered terrace into an open courtyard featuring a large central fountain
circles around the central fountain to explore the courtyard surroundings

agents.ego_description: exploring the sunlit courtyard, walking around the central fountain and observing the ornate surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in a brown dress standing near the fountain edge

entered.detail: octagonal stone fountain with multiple tiers and water feature in the middle of the courtyard
elaborate historic building with arched doorways and decorative stonework
large stone planters filled with blooming pink roses flanking the courtyard path

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered terrace, the scene opens into a bright courtyard centered around an elegant octagonal fountain. Geralt walks around the fountain, passing large stone planters with pink roses. Ornate historic buildings with arched doorways surround the space. A woman in a brown dress stands near the water feature as the character continues exploring the sun-drenched plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the sun-drenched city of Toussaint, transitioning from a grand descent into a series of vibrant plazas and sheltered walkways. It begins with Geralt descending a grand stone staircase flanked by ornate balustrades, following an NPC in a purple hat toward the city below. As the camera emerges into a wide-open town square, the scene shifts from the stairs to a cobblestone plaza dominated by a massive central tree and colorful Renaissance-style townhouses. The movement then carries the character up a street and under a massive triumphal arch, before opening into a covered stone terrace where potted red flowers line a colonnade overlooking the distant sea and mountains. Finally, the scene expands from the sheltered terrace into a bright courtyard centered around an elegant octagonal fountain and large planters of pink roses.
